name: Cauca (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the fertile lands, mountains and forests of Cauca
the gold and other mineral wealth of the department

description: Three equal horizontal stripes of green, yellow, and green.
history: Cauca is one of Colombia's oldest departments, created in 1857 from the Confederation of Granada. The yellow-and-green flag recalls the gold mines of the Cauca valley and the green of its highland landscape.

features.symbolism: green for the fertility of Cauca's mountains and valleys; yellow for its mineral wealth, especially gold
